title: Grilled Cheese & Tomato Soup
description: A classic comfort food combination, perfect for a cozy family meal. This easy recipe brings together crispy grilled cheese sandwiches with a warm, flavorful tomato soup.
instructions: Melt 2 tbsp of butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Pour in the diced tomatoes and vegetable broth. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat and let it cook for 15 minutes.
While the soup simmers, butter one side of each bread slice. Place cheese between the unbuttered sides of two slices of bread to make sandwiches.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Place grilled cheese sandwiches, butter-side down, in the skillet. Cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until golden brown and cheese is melted.
Carefully blend the soup with an immersion blender until smooth. Stir in the heavy cream, salt, and pepper. Heat through for 2-3 minutes, but do not boil.
Cut grilled cheese sandwiches in half or into fun shapes for kids. Serve immediately with the warm tomato soup.
tips: For extra flavor, add a pinch of dried basil or oregano to the tomato soup.
Use different types of cheese like provolone or mozzarella for variety in your grilled cheese.
To make the soup even creamier, you can add a tablespoon of cream cheese or a splash of milk along with the heavy cream.
